task.desc: Add a Makefile target named format that runs python3 -m black on all Python files in scripts/

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add 'format' target to Makefile","target_files":["Makefile"],"patch_commands":"sed -i '/^target:.*^python3 -m black/,/^^[^ ]*$/a\\tformat:\\tpython3 -m black --line-length 79 scripts/","validation_commands":"grep -q 'format' Makefile","expected_outcome":"Makefile now contains 'format' target that runs black on scripts/","risk_notes":"No risk","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}

parsed.expected_outcome: Makefile now contains 'format' target that runs black on scripts/
